ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the image */,
  "file" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image was created */,
  "focal_point_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the focal point */,
  "focal_point_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the focal point */,
  "focal_point_width" REAL /* Width of the focal point area */,
  "focal_point_height" REAL /* Height of the focal point area */,
  "uploaded_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the image belongs to */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file for integrity verification */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "resolution" INTEGER /* Resolution of the image (DPI) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for categorization and search */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the image (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the image has been used */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the image for use */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collection (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collection */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_last_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_uses" (
  "use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each use */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "used_in" TEXT /* Context where the image was used (e.g., news_article, program) */,
  "used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image was used */,
  "used_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_uses_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_uses_used_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("used_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
